active.note: Boundary C was merged to local main at 7d0c925 under explicit user release authorization. The user will configure APP_BORROW_EXECUTOR=live and non-secret alias references in .env, then restart the service. Task deletion is authorized only after the new service enumerates exact targets; the durable global Start gate and every real Binance borrow remain disabled pending a later explicit action.

note: Fixed-path active-stage pointer. A new session reads this first to locate the active stage in one hop, without scanning reports/agent-runs/. When a stage starts, the bookkeeper sets active to {stage_id, phase, handoff, updated_at}; when the stage is accepted/merged/abandoned, active returns to null and last_completed is updated.
